description: Fraud where criminals impersonate police, CBI, ED, customs, TRAI, courts or other authorities and keep victims on video or voice calls under false arrest threats to extort money or steal information.
recommended_actions: Disconnect the call immediately; Indian law enforcement does not conduct arrests over video calls.
Do not transfer money for verification, bail, security deposit or account clearance.
Do not share Aadhaar, PAN, bank details, OTPs, passwords or screen access.
Report financial fraud immediately by calling 1930.
Preserve call logs, video call screenshots, phone numbers, bank details, notices and transaction receipts.

rules.name: Digital Arrest Claim
rules.explanation: Claims the victim is under digital or virtual arrest, a false concept used in cyber extortion.
examples: You are under digital arrest and must stay on video call.
Do not disconnect or police will come to your house.

rules.name: Law Enforcement Impersonation
rules.explanation: Impersonates police, CBI, ED, customs or similar authorities to create fear and compliance.
examples: I am calling from CBI regarding a money laundering case.
This is Mumbai Police cyber cell. Your Aadhaar is misused.

rules.name: Parcel Drugs or Customs Case
rules.explanation: Claims an illegal parcel or customs case is linked to the victim's identity.
examples: A parcel in your name contains drugs and passports.
Customs has seized your courier for illegal items.

rules.name: Aadhaar PAN or SIM Misuse Allegation
rules.explanation: Alleges misuse of the victim's identity documents, SIM or bank account to scare them.
examples: Your Aadhaar was used in a money laundering case.
A SIM in your name is involved in illegal activity.

rules.name: Fake Court Warrant or Notice
rules.explanation: Uses fabricated warrants, FIRs or court notices to intimidate the victim.
examples: A non-bailable warrant has been issued against you.
FIR registered. Download court notice and stay online.

rules.name: Money Transfer for Verification or Bail
rules.explanation: Demands money for fake verification, bail, clearance or transfer to a so-called safe account.
examples: Transfer money to RBI safe account for verification.
Pay bail amount now or arrest team will arrive.

rules.name: Video Investigation Pressure
rules.explanation: Keeps the victim isolated on a video call to maintain control and prevent outside help.
examples: Keep camera on and do not speak to family.
You are under video investigation until clearance.

rules.name: Confidentiality Threat
rules.explanation: Orders secrecy to isolate the victim from family, bank staff or police who could stop the fraud.
examples: This is a confidential national security case. Do not inform anyone.
Do not call your bank or family during investigation.

rules.name: Fake Government or Police Document
rules.explanation: Sends fake documents, IDs or letterheads to make the impersonation look official.
examples: See my police ID card and official notice attached.
Your case file and summons are attached.

rules.name: Remote Access or Screen Sharing
rules.explanation: Requests screen sharing or remote access during the fake investigation to view banking activity or steal credentials.
examples: Share your screen while transferring verification amount.
Install remote verification app and read access code.
